auth_notes: Requires Client ID and Client Secret obtained via the Fastenal Developer Portal. Authentication follows a standard Bearer token flow, but access is typically restricted to established enterprise customers.
rate_limits: Not publicly disclosed; typically governed by enterprise service level agreements (SLAs).
gotchas: Documentation is often behind a login and requires an active account representative to enable API access.
Data structures may follow EDI-influenced formats which can be more rigid than standard REST APIs.
Sandbox environments are limited and often require manual provisioning by Fastenal support.
research_notes: Integration will require the HTTP Request node. The workflow must include a step to POST to the Fastenal OAuth endpoint to retrieve a JWT, followed by subsequent API calls using the 'Authorization: Bearer {{token}}' header. Polling logic will be necessary for inventory monitoring as webhooks are not standard for their VMI suite.
